findings.description: The section label for step 3 is rendered as "**[正常終了]**" in the knowledge file, but the source explicitly uses "**[往路処理]**" as the section header for that block (under the `.. _outbound:` anchor). The sub-label "(正常終了)" appears only as a step subtitle in the source, not as the section header.
findings.source_evidence:
.. _outbound:

**[往路処理]**
  **3. (正常終了)**
    ハンドラキューでの処理が正常に終了した時点で...

findings.description: The knowledge file table adds a "デフォルト値" column that does not exist in the source. The source table has four columns: 設定項目, プロパティ名, データ型, 備考. There is no default value column in the source.
